sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10551" key="a)ntisumbouleu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντισυμβουλεύω</orth>, <sense id="n10551.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give contrary advice,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
